title: Funerary Mask
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers only at the start of the first turn of combat (RoundNumber ≤ 1). Soul cards are added to a random position in the draw pile.
